plan_adherence_notes: Execution matched the plan closely. The branch added shared HTTP test helpers for create-market, comment-post, event-trade, and resolve; added success-path rate-limit header coverage across all five protected POST routes; updated the stale resolve success expectation by moving header absence to a dedicated limiter-disabled test; and kept the existing ProbabilityEdit tests as the regression seam for decrement math, 429s, Retry-After, and per-agent isolation. The only notable drift is a small non-functional refactor in backend/server.py that extracts agent-id normalization helpers even though the plan preferred touching backend code only if route-breadth tests exposed a shared-path header gap.
reason: The implementation follows the research-backed scope and keeps the shared handle_api()/rate_limit_headers() contract intact while extending HTTP coverage to the full five-route protected POST surface. Focused auth/rate-limit coverage passed via `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_api.py' -k BayesMarketApiAuthRateLimitTests` (21 tests), and the broader `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_api.py'` run also passed (233 tests).
